ores.description: Raw materials for smithing and crafting

copper_ore.description: A common copper ore used for bronze bars.

tin_ore.description: A common tin ore used for bronze bars.

iron_ore.description: An iron ore used for iron and steel bars.

coal.description: Essential fuel for smelting higher-tier bars.

silver_ore.description: A shiny silver ore used for crafting jewellery.

gold_ore.description: A valuable gold ore used for gold bars and jewellery.

mithril_ore.description: A rare blue ore used for mithril bars.

adamantite_ore.description: A valuable green ore used for adamantite bars.

platinum_ore.description: A rare platinum ore used for platinum bars.

runite_ore.description: The rarest ore, used for runite bars.

log.description: Basic logs from normal trees. Used for fletching.

oak_log.description: Sturdy oak logs. Used for fletching.

willow_log.description: Flexible willow logs. Used for fletching.

maple_log.description: Strong maple logs. Used for fletching.

yew_log.description: High-quality yew logs. Used for fletching.

magic_log.description: Rare magical logs. Used for fletching.

redwood_log.description: Ancient redwood logs. Used for fletching.

seeds.description: Seeds for growing crops on your farm

potato_seed.description:
Plant to grow potatoes. Grows in 2h.
Requires farming level 1.

onion_seed.description:
Plant to grow onions. Grows in 3h.
Requires farming level 5.

cabbage_seed.description:
Plant to grow cabbage. Grows in 4h.
Requires farming level 10.

carrot_seed.description:
Plant to grow carrots. Grows in 5h.
Requires farming level 15.

tomato_seed.description:
Plant to grow tomatoes. Grows in 6h.
Requires farming level 20.

corn_seed.description:
Plant to grow corn. Grows in 7h.
Requires farming level 25.

pumpkin_seed.description:
Plant to grow pumpkins. Grows in 9h.
Requires farming level 30.

watermelon_seed.description:
Plant to grow watermelons. Grows in 10h.
Requires farming level 35.

strawberry_seed.description:
Plant to grow strawberries. Grows in 11h.
Requires farming level 40.

magic_herb_seed.description:
Plant to grow magic herbs. Grows in 13h.
Requires farming level 50.

dragon_fruit_seed.description:
Plant to grow dragon fruit. Grows in 14h.
Requires farming level 55.

golden_wheat_seed.description:
Plant to grow golden wheat. Grows in 16h.
Requires farming level 65.

spirit_seed.description:
Plant to grow spirit herbs. Grows in 19h.
Requires farming level 75.

celestial_bloom_seed.description:
Plant to grow celestial blooms. Grows in 21h.
Requires farming level 85.

starfruit_seed.description:
Plant to grow starfruit. Grows in 23h.
Requires farming level 95.

void_lotus_seed.description:
Plant to grow void lotus. Grows in 24h.
Requires farming level 99.

merchants_guild.description: Exclusive items unlocked by levelling your Mercantile skill.

spirit_herb.description: A rare herb used in high-level herblore. Requires Mercantile level 20 to purchase.

celestial_bloom.description: An ethereal flower used in master potions. Requires Mercantile level 40 to purchase.

void_lotus.description: A mysterious lotus used in the rarest concoctions. Requires Mercantile level 60 to purchase.

ring_of_wealth.description: Increases coin drops slightly. Requires Mercantile level 40 to purchase.

ring_of_recoil.description: Returns a portion of damage taken to attackers. Requires Mercantile level 20 to purchase.

ring_of_suffering.description: A powerful ring that grants significant defense. Requires Mercantile level 80 to purchase.

berserker_ring.description: Increases melee strength. Requires Mercantile level 60 to purchase.

archers_ring.description: Increases ranged accuracy. Requires Mercantile level 60 to purchase.

seers_ring.description: Increases magic accuracy. Requires Mercantile level 60 to purchase.

amulet_of_strength.description: Increases melee strength bonus. Requires Mercantile level 20 to purchase.

amulet_of_fury.description: A powerful amulet granting bonuses to all combat styles. Requires Mercantile level 80 to purchase.

necklace_of_anguish.description: Provides exceptional ranged attack bonuses. Requires Mercantile level 99 to purchase.

tormented_bracelet.description: Provides exceptional magic bonuses. Requires Mercantile level 99 to purchase.
